steps.title: Identify the restricted population
steps.content:
The condition given that it is not classified as a motor neuron restricts our sample to only Sensory and Interneurons. From the table:

Sensory neurons: $13 + 7 + 3 = 23$
Interneurons: $10 + 34 + 0 = 44$

Total non-motor neurons: $23 + 44 = 67$

steps.title: Count favorable outcomes in the restricted population
steps.content:
Among these 67 non-motor neurons, we count those with diameter $\leq 30$ micrometers (the Less than 20 and 20 to 30 columns):

Sensory with diameter $\leq 30$: $13 + 7 = 20$
Interneurons with diameter $\leq 30$: $10 + 34 = 44$

Total with diameter $\leq 30$: $20 + 44 = 64$

Therefore, the conditional probability is $\frac{64}{67} \approx 0.9552$. The answer is 64/67.
